title: Currency Risk Calculator
description: Industrial-grade tool for assessing foreign exchange exposure and quantifying potential financial impact using ISO 31000, Lean, and Six Sigma principles.

inputs.label: Exposure Amount (in base currency)
inputs.businessContext: Total value of foreign currency receivables or payables subject to exchange rate fluctuation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total value of foreign currency receivables or payables subject to exchange rate fluctuation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Döviz kuru dalgalanmasına tabi yabancı para alacak veya borçların toplam değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtwert der auf Fremdwährung lautenden Forderungen oder Verbindlichkeiten, die Wechselkursschwankungen unterliegen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur totale des créances ou dettes en devises soumises aux fluctuations des taux de change.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor total de cuentas por cobrar o pagar en moneda extranjera sujetas a fluctuación del tipo de cambio.

inputs.label: Annualized Volatility of Exchange Rate
inputs.businessContext: Historical or implied standard deviation of daily log returns annualized (ISO 31000 risk metric).

label_i18n.fr: Volatilité annualisée du taux de change
label_i18n.es: Volatilidad anualizada del tipo de cambio

businessContext_i18n.en: Historical or implied standard deviation of daily log returns annualized (ISO 31000 risk metric).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Günlük log getirilerinin yıllıklandırılmış tarihsel veya zımni standart sapması (ISO 31000 risk metriği).
businessContext_i18n.de: Historische oder implizite Standardabweichung der täglichen logarithmischen Renditen, annualisiert (ISO 31000 Risikokennzahl).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart-type historique ou implicite des rendements logarithmiques quotidiens annualisé (métrique de risque ISO 31000).
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación estándar histórica o implícita de los rendimientos logarítmicos diarios anualizada (métrica de riesgo ISO 31000).

inputs.label: Confidence Level for VaR Calculation
inputs.businessContext: Statistical confidence level used in Value at Risk (VaR) estimation, typical values 90%, 95%, 99%.

label_i18n.fr: Niveau de confiance pour le calcul de la VaR
label_i18n.es: Nivel de confianza para el cálculo del VaR

businessContext_i18n.en: Statistical confidence level used in Value at Risk (VaR) estimation, typical values 90%, 95%, 99%.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Riskteki Değer (VaR) tahmininde kullanılan istatistiksel güven düzeyi, tipik değerler %90, %95, %99.
businessContext_i18n.de: Statistisches Konfidenzniveau für die Value-at-Risk-Schätzung, typische Werte 90 %, 95 %, 99 %.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau de confiance statistique utilisé dans l'estimation de la valeur à risque (VaR), valeurs typiques 90 %, 95 %, 99 %.
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de confianza estadístico utilizado en la estimación del Valor en Riesgo (VaR), valores típicos 90%, 95%, 99%.

inputs.label: Hedge Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of exposure covered by hedging instruments (forwards, options). Lean metric for waste reduction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of exposure covered by hedging instruments (forwards, options). Lean metric for waste reduction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Korunma araçları (forward, opsiyon) ile kapsanan maruziyet yüzdesi. İsraf azaltımı için yalın metrik.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Exposition, der durch Absicherungsinstrumente (Termingeschäfte, Optionen) gedeckt ist. Lean-Kennzahl zur Verschwendungsreduzierung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de l'exposition couvert par des instruments de couverture (contrats à terme, options). Métrique Lean pour la réduction des gaspillages.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de exposición cubierto por instrumentos de cobertura (forwards, opciones). Métrica Lean para reducción de desperdicio.

inputs.label: Time Horizon (days)
inputs.businessContext: Risk assessment period aligned with business planning cycles (WERC supply chain standard).

businessContext_i18n.en: Risk assessment period aligned with business planning cycles (WERC supply chain standard).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İş planlama döngüleriyle uyumlu risk değerlendirme dönemi (WERC tedarik zinciri standardı).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Période d'évaluation des risques alignée sur les cycles de planification d'entreprise (norme WERC supply chain).
businessContext_i18n.es: Período de evaluación de riesgo alineado con los ciclos de planificación empresarial (estándar de cadena de suministro WERC).

inputs.label: Enable Lean Volatility Adjustment
inputs.businessContext: Applies a Six Sigma-based correction factor to account for process variation in hedging execution.

businessContext_i18n.en: Applies a Six Sigma-based correction factor to account for process variation in hedging execution.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hedefleme yürütmesindeki süreç değişkenliğini hesaba katmak için Altı Sigma tabanlı bir düzeltme faktörü uygular.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wendet einen Six-Sigma-basierten Korrekturfaktor an, um Prozessschwankungen bei der Absicherungsausführung zu berücksichtigen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Applique un facteur de correction basé sur Six Sigma pour tenir compte de la variation du processus dans l'exécution de la couverture.
businessContext_i18n.es: Aplica un factor de corrección basado en Seis Sigma para tener en cuenta la variación del proceso en la ejecución de coberturas.

rules.message: Exposure amount must be at least 1,000 USD.
Annualized volatility must be between 0.5% and 50%.
Hedge ratio must be between 0% and 100%.
Time horizon must be between 1 and 365 days.

thresholds.message: Value at Risk exceeds 5% of exposure – consider increasing hedge ratio.
Volatility is above 20% – high risk environment, review hedging strategy.
Hedge ratio below 30% – significant unhedged exposure, potential for large losses.

hiddenLossDrivers: Volatility clustering – potential regime shift not captured by constant volatility
Basis risk between spot and forward rates
Liquidity risk in exotic currency pairs
suggestedActions: Increase hedge ratio to at least 70% to reduce tail risk
Implement rolling hedge program to smooth execution costs
Use options collar strategy to limit downside while retaining upside
Monitor macroeconomic indicators (interest rate differentials, trade balances)
